things.name: Stone Forest (Shilin)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage karst limestone formations soaring 30m like a petrified forest

things.name: Dianchi Lake & Western Hills
things.description: Yunnan's largest lake with the Dragon Gate grottoes carved into the Western Hills

things.name: Yuantong Temple
things.description: 1,200-year-old Buddhist temple complex with gardens, ponds and a Tang-dynasty pagoda

things.name: Yunnan Provincial Museum
things.description: Bronze Age Dian Kingdom bronzes, minority culture and Yunnan's extraordinary biodiversity

things.name: Green Lake Park (Cuihu)
things.description: Beloved city park with red-billed gulls from Siberia October-March and lakeside cafes

things.name: Lijiang Old Town Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Naxi minority old town with cobblestone streets 3 hours away

things.name: Mushroom Hot Pot
things.description: Yunnan's famous wild mushroom hotpot - an extraordinary variety unique to the province

things.name: Dali Ancient City Day Trip
things.description: Bai minority old town on Erhai Lake with a Buddhist pagoda and markets

things.name: Kunming World Horticultural Expo Garden
things.description: 1999 Expo site with 92 national and international gardens

things.name: Bamboo Temple (Qiongzhu Si)
things.description: Buddhist temple with 500 extraordinary larger-than-life clay Arhat figures
